description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a beige brick exterior. The front facade features a prominent arched window above the main entrance, which is flanked by two sets of rectangular windows on each floor. The main door is centered and painted in a muted pink, surrounded by glass panels that allow natural light into the entryway. The windows are symmetrically arranged and have white frames with decorative grilles. The sides of the house are plain, with no windows or doors, while the rear mirrors the front with a similar arched window and symmetrical window arrangement. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A two-story beige brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical white-framed windows, and a central arched window above a pink main door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main pink door, large arched window above, and four symmetrically placed rectangular windows.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain beige brick wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large arched window and symmetrical window arrangement similar to the front, but without a main door.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain beige brick wall with no windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a central arched window
attribute_entryway_design: Central pink door with glass side panels, no steps or porch, and a large arched window above
